reason: Tool runtime contracts: descriptor registration, ToolExecutionRuntime ownership, budget, and event envelope contracts — defines where the read cache must live and how it interacts with the existing runtime
Code standards and forbidden patterns for backend changes
Error handling conventions for tool execution failures and NOVI_ERROR codes
Verified pi-agent-core public API: ExecutionEnv.fileInfo, AgentTool result shape, harness hook events (session_before_compact)
Technical design for the read result cache: ReadResultCache class, wiring into ToolExecutionRuntime, edit/write invalidation, and compaction reset
